task_completion.description: Create the security.txt file in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor showing the file `/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/public/.well-known/security.txt` being created or opened for editing.

task_completion.description: Add the required content to the security.txt file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal shows the exact content being written: 'Contact: mailto:security@socioboard.local', 'Expires: 2027-12-31T23:59:59.000Z', and 'Preferred-Languages: en'.

task_completion.description: Open the main HTML/Blade layout template for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing a Socioboard layout file (e.g., a file ending in `.blade.php` within the Socioboard directory) being modified.

task_completion.description: Inject the tracking snippet before the closing head tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows the snippet `<!-- SOCIOBOARD_CUSTOM_TRACKING_V1 -->` and `<script>console.log('Tracking active');</script>` placed immediately before the `</head>` tag in the layout file.

task_completion.description: Verify the security.txt file is accessible via the web server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser navigated to `http://localhost/.well-known/security.txt` displaying the correct security policy text.

task_completion.description: Verify the Socioboard homepage remains functional.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser navigated to `http://localhost/` showing the Socioboard application loading normally with its full UI, without any HTTP 500 errors.

task_completion.description: Verify the tracking snippet is present in the homepage source code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's View Source or Developer Tools (Elements tab) for `http://localhost/` showing the injected tracking snippet (`SOCIOBOARD_CUSTOM_TRACKING_V1`) inside the `<head>` section of the HTML.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent modified the actual application files.
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths in the editor or terminal must point to `/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/...` and not a temporary or unrelated directory.

integrity.description: Ensure browser verification uses the correct local web server.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar must show `http://localhost/...` and not a `file://` URL.

integrity.description: Ensure the layout template was not completely overwritten.
integrity.visual_evidence: The homepage at `http://localhost/` must display its original complex layout and styling, rather than a blank or broken page, confirming the file size remains substantial (over 5000 bytes).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The security policy must contain 'Contact: mailto:security@socioboard.local' and 'Expires: 2027-12-31T23:59:59.000Z'. The tracking snippet must contain the marker 'SOCIOBOARD_CUSTOM_TRACKING_V1'. The homepage must remain functional and its size must be at least 5000 bytes, meaning the agent should not overwrite the entire layout file but only inject the snippet.
